surface: Android instrumentation on shared emulator emulator-5554 / AVD atermApi35 via :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest

isolation.sharedSurfaceBoundary: single Android instrumentation flow at a time

commandsRun.command: /root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices -l && /root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed && /root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop init.svc.bootanim && /root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell 'toybox nc -z -w 2 10.0.2.2 3122; echo fixture:$?'
commandsRun.observation: emulator-5554 was online, boot completed was 1, boot animation was stopped, and the SSH fixture endpoint was reachable from the emulator (fixture:0).
Focused instrumentation ran 4 assigned tests on emulator-5554 with 0 failures.

assertionsTested.title: Favorite hosts can be marked, unmarked, and rediscovered after relaunch
observed: The test toggled the saved host into favorites, removed it, and re-favorited it with the favorite surface updating each time.
After recreating the app container, the same host reappeared in the favorite surface, proving relaunch persistence.
Opening the favorite entry reused the same saved host record, and deleting that host cleared the favorite surface without leaving a zombie favorite row.

evidence.consoleErrors: none found in copied assertion logcat
evidence.network: No external HTTP calls; local persistence behavior only.

assertionsTested.title: Recently connected hosts are surfaced for quick rediscovery
observed: The flow connected to host A, then host B, then host A again against the real SSH fixture at 10.0.2.2:3122.
The recent-host surface showed a single newest-first entry for A above B, with no duplicate recent rows for A.
After relaunch, favorites and recents persisted, and the same alpha/beta saved host ids were still surfaced in the expected order.

evidence.consoleErrors: none found in copied assertion logcat
evidence.network: Real SSH connections from emulator to 10.0.2.2:3122 succeeded for the repeated A/B/A sequence.

assertionsTested.title: Terminal font size changes apply to already-open and newly opened sessions and persist across relaunch
observed: With a live SSH fixture session open, increasing terminal font scale changed the visible terminal metrics for the already-open session.
After disconnecting and reconnecting, the newly opened session retained the updated terminal metrics, showing the new size applied to new sessions too.
After relaunch, reconnecting again preserved the same updated metrics, and the persisted settings repository value remained 1.75.

evidence.consoleErrors: none found in copied assertion logcat
evidence.network: Fixture-backed session reconnects to 10.0.2.2:3122 succeeded before and after the preference change.

assertionsTested.title: Theme preference applies consistently to main and transient app surfaces and persists across relaunch
observed: Starting from light theme, switching to dark updated the shared theme marker on Settings.
The same dark theme marker was then observed on Hosts, Session, and Snippets surfaces, covering the main user-visible surfaces exercised by the test.
After relaunch, dark theme remained active and the persisted settings repository still stored ThemePreference.DARK.

evidence.consoleErrors: none found in copied assertion logcat
evidence.network: Not applicable; this assertion covered local preference propagation and persistence.

summary: Validated 4 assigned assertions on emulator-5554: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.

frictions.description: The current Android instrumentation harness emits XML/HTML/logcat artifacts but does not produce standalone per-step screenshots for these UI flows.
